text: A setback
To overcome
A pivotal moment
In hindsight
To embark on
Daunting
A leap of faith
To pave the way
A gut feeling
Against all odds
To put behind you
A defining moment
Rewarding
By the time I arrived, she had left.
I had been dreaming of change for years.
That first trip paved the way for everything after.
Selling the house was a real leap of faith.
In hindsight, leaving was the best choice I ever made.
Against all odds, the new bakery thrived.
It was a defining moment for me.
I had a gut feeling it was time to go.
Against all odds, I started again.
By the time I decided, I had been dreaming of it for years.
It was a real leap of faith.
In hindsight, it was the best decision.
That choice paved the way for everything after.
I have finally put those years behind me.

For years, she had been dreaming of a change she could not yet name. The early setbacks had felt daunting, and she nearly gave up. Trusting a gut feeling, she took a leap of faith and stepped back from the clinic. Against all odds, the move paved the way for a far more rewarding chapter. In hindsight, that quiet decision had become the defining moment of her life.
